task: Replace legacy 38-item hover-dropdown AccountingSubNav with unified 12-tab clean nav bar. All accounting pages automatically get the new nav via the shared AccountingSubNav component.
details: subnav-manifest.ts: added ACCOUNTING_CLEAN_TABS export (12 tabs: Home, Bills, Expenses, Bill Payment, Invoices, Receive Payment, Settlements, Factoring, Journal Entries, Find Transactions, Reports, Settings)
AccountingSubNav.tsx: rewritten — NavLink tab bar using ACCOUNTING_CLEAN_TABS; removed HoverDropdownNav; data-testid=accounting-subnav-unified
AccountingSubNavWrapper.tsx: imports ACCOUNTING_CLEAN_TABS from manifest; removed local duplicate ACCOUNTING_TABS const
All 21 pages using AccountingSubNav automatically get the unified nav with zero per-page changes
verify-ob1-nav-header-unify.mjs: 8/8 PASS; wired to CI + package.json
